ingredients_text: Crust (enriched flour [wheat flour, niacin, reduced iron, thiamine mononitrate, riboflavin, folic acid], water, yeast, soybean oil, sugar, soluble corn product, dried garlic), reduced fat mozzarella cheese (cultured part-skim milk and skim milk, modified cornstarch*, salt, vitamin a palmitate, enzymes, *ingredient not in regular mozzarella cheese), water, tomato paste, seasoning (maltodextrin, modified cornstarch, sugar, salt, dextrose, spices, spice extractives, dried garlic, citric acid, xanthan gum), 2% or less of parmesan, asiago, and romano cheese blend (cultured part-skim cow's milk, salt, enzymes), modified cornstarch, salt, garlic powder, spice.
